Unit Price: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) [Add to Cart](javascript:__doPostBack\('ctl00$ctl00$ctl00$MainBody$MainBody$MainContent$Loader$ctl01$ctl00$AddProductToCart',''\)) * [Product Description](#db7fb431-21de-4f4a-9c83-1e9de2788421) * [Shipping](#bcf6c745-99bc-43b2-8095-8c0798c80c4b) Make hanging your banners and flags quick and secure with the Hanging Clips 2 Pack from Banners.com, designed to hook easily through grommet holes and attach banners to cables, poles, or fixtures. These simple, reliable clips help you display your graphics cleanly and professionally for events, storefronts, and outdoor signage. ### Shipping Information Please specify which shipping method you would like when you place your order. Shipping prices are determined by the weight of the package and the destination. Additional shipping charges apply to large orders and over-sized packages. If you are located outside of the Continental United States, please contact us for a shipping quote. If you are located outside of the Continental United States, please contact us for a shipping quote. We offer the following shipping methods: * Economy (5-10 Business Days) * Standard (3-5 Business Days) * Three Day (3 Business Days) * Two Day (2 Business Days) * Overnight (1 Business Day) * Freight Shipping prices are determined by the weight of the package and the destination. Additional shipping charges apply to large orders and over-sized packages. Please note, due to UPS shipping restrictions, banners that exceed 8' in both directions will generally be folded for shipping (billboards, large backdrops etc.) If you are located outside of the Continental United States, please contact us for a shipping quote. **You will receive a tracking number once your package has been shipped.** After products have shipped, all shipping company terms and conditions apply for lost or delayed packages. We will not refund the banner cost if any shipping company has a delay in your package. We recommend ordering your banners early. Delays because of Acts of God or anything beyond our control will not result in shipping refunds. If the product is damaged in shipping, damaged goods must be returned, and then a replacement product will be sent. Lost packages will be replaced after the shipping company confirms loss. This generally takes 7-10 business days after initial scheduled delivery. Please order your banners early as we cannot control delivery after your product leaves our production facilities. **International shipping Notes:** For international shipments, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently, we only accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS. For more details, please contact our customer service team. **Economy Shipping** If choosing economy shipping please add in additional postal information such as P.O. Box in the "Address Two" field on the checkout page to help ensure delivery. Using economy shipping can also add an additional 5 - 10 days, depending on where the package is being shipped to. ## Why Choose Banners.com? **Customer Service** Our customer service
